name: Icon Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Other eligible retail spends (including weekday dining)

domestic: 2 complimentary visits per quarter, unlocked by spending ₹35,000 or more in the previous calendar quarter

milestones.label: 10,000 bonus reward points on annual spend of ₹3 Lakhs
15,000 additional bonus reward points on annual spend of ₹5 Lakhs
20,000 additional bonus reward points on annual spend of ₹8 Lakhs

milestoneBenefits: Earn 10,000 bonus reward points on annual spends of ₹3 Lakhs
Earn additional 15,000 bonus points on annual spends of ₹5 Lakhs
Earn additional 20,000 bonus points on annual spends of ₹8 Lakhs
additionalBenefits: Welcome benefit of 20,000 Reward Points upon card activation and payment of joining fee
Buy 1 Get 1 free movie ticket on BookMyShow up to ₹200, twice a month
Complimentary golf rounds and discount on green fees at select golf courses in India
additionalDetails: Redemption fee of ₹99 + GST applies per redemption request via the RBL Rewards portal (rblrewards.rbl.bank.in).
Reward points cannot be redeemed as statement credit against the card bill.
No direct airline miles transfer — points are redeemed for travel bookings and vouchers through the RBL Rewards portal at ₹0.25 per point.
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% at all fuel stations for transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (Max waiver ₹150/month).
Concierge services including golf course referrals, car rentals, and hotel bookings.

voucherRedemptions.programme: Flight & hotel bookings via RBL Rewards portal

salaried: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable income source meeting bank criteria
selfEmployed: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable business income meeting bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
Weekend dining is defined as spends on Saturday and Sunday.
International lounge access is chargeable at up to $35 per visit.
